title: orthrosanthus muelleri
intro: Orthrosanthus muelleri is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the Mueller's iris or the yellow iris. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and eye problems, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Orthrosanthus muelleri typically involve extracting its active compounds, which can be used in creams, ointments, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
